summary: The genFragEntry function generates metabolite library entries from MS/MS spectra. The mspToLib function converts MS/MS spectra from .msp library files into MetaboAnnotatoR metabolite library entries.
The genFragEntry function attributes occurrence scores to peaks above the mpeaksThres threshold (marker peaks) and above the noise level.

The default noise parameter for genFragEntry is 0.005. The default mpeaksScore parameter for genFragEntry is 0.9. The default mpeaksThres parameter for genFragEntry is 0.1. The default mzTol parameter for genFragEntry is 0.01.
